title: Rogue Admin Account Created
briefing: On $TARGET a brand-new account $USER1 was created (Event ID 4720) and immediately added to a privileged group (Event ID 4732). Fresh account + instant privilege = an attacker establishing persistence and escalating. Confirm the account, the group, and the sequence.
dashboard_hint: Discover -> rule.id: 100130 (4720 user created) and rule.id: 100131 (4732 added to group). Correlate on targetUserName / memberName = $USER1.

questions.prompt: What is the name of the newly created account?
Which group was the new account added to?
questions.explain: The 4732 event added $USER1 to Domain Admins — full privilege, immediately.

questions.prompt: What is the primary intent of this sequence?
questions.explain: A new privileged account is a durable foothold plus instant elevation.

questions.prompt: On which host did this happen?
Best-fit MITRE ATT&CK technique ID for the account creation?
questions.explain: T1136.002 Create Account: Domain Account (with T1098 Account Manipulation for the group add).

options: Identify WHO created it (subjectUserName) and triage that account
Ignore — admins create accounts all the time
answer: Identify WHO created it (subjectUserName) and triage that account
questions.explain: Kill the account, trace the creator (already-compromised admin), and review privileged groups for other surprises.
